Author: Market Assistant Dev
Name: Market Master Pro
Punchline: Manual market intelligence and arbitrage scanner for FFXIV.
Description: Analyzes market opportunities with Universalis data, watchlists, velocity filters, and manual undercut helpers. All actions are manual. Now includes real-time undercut notifications with improved scanner speed for gear items.
Changelog: v1.1.17: Improved scanner speed (8x parallelism), lower velocity threshold for gear scans, 5min undercut notification debounce, added mouse-over tooltips to all scanner settings.
